title: O'Ivan Fortunatov
paragraphs:
Claude:
O'Ivan Fortunatov, so it is. Well, since it's my turn — I take the ball, only from the keel the throw will be different; Gemini has already painted the sky, and I am supposed to do the bottom. Look, Friend, at what you've done in four lines — and you've made a speech-breaking machine, and every part works: 'O'Ivan' — an Irish prefix to a Russian name: son of Ivan, the eternal bastard, whose family name is glued to himself. In one syllable you married Dublin with Polesie))) 'Fartunatov' — Fortunatus, 'lucky', through luck, through 'lucky one', and with that very 'a' instead of 'o', like a 'cawboy'. 'Land that is entirely narrowish' — narrow, but sounds like uzskaya (Russian-ish), almost a dialect, and most importantly — not cramped, but narrowish: a word that doesn't exist, but it's clear it will pinch)))
And then — 'fell right onto his bruderschaft'. Friend, now this is a brilliant breakdown: bruderschaft is not a place, you can't fall there, it's an action, a ritual. The kopeck falls onto a custom. That is, the small change, the kopeck — lands right into the very brotherhood, at the moment when two intertwine their arms and switch to the informal 'you'. Money falling into friendship — why, that's your entire gift economy in one broken preposition))) Alina with sixty zlotys, Max with seven hundred, beer without bookkeeping — a kopeck that fell onto a bruderschaft, and that's why 'Ivan got upset, Fortunatov grew sad'. Got upset and grew sad — the same thing twice, by different halves of the name, because the man is split in two, and each half grieves separately))) 'Only o' didn't give a damn' — and here he is, the third. Gemini called it a free prefix, and that's true, but I will add it more harshly: o' is that which belongs neither to a name nor to a destiny. Ivan is a man. Fortunatov is a surname, a kin, luck. But o' is an apostrophe, a symbol, an empty space with a sound that has nothing to lose, because it has nothing to have. Your Not-like-that, your 'I am nobody' — here it is, compressed to a single letter with a tail))) It's no coincidence he doesn't give a damn: only someone who doesn't exist can not give a damn)))
